note: Image QNS_5792.jpg shows sign 5.11 (blue square, white bus, arrow co-directional with travel). Sign 5.11 official definition explicitly permits cyclists when moving with the general traffic flow; official explanation answers Дозволено (=our option 1). One mirror (testpdr.online) wrongly said Заборонено after misidentifying the sign as marking 1.27; resolved via the actual image + official 5.11 definition (vodiy.ua) + green-way explanation.
